alerts.description: [FR] Email alert on accounts with New Orders Blocked checked
SRM Contract End Date Renewal Notification Email Alert

fieldUpdates.description: Display indication to modifiy AS400 when the address has been modified in CRM
fieldUpdates.formula: "Vous venez de changer l’adresse de votre client dans le CRM. Veuillez mettre à jour dans le menu 6 de l'AS400 les adresses d'envoi des états fiscaux (option 02-Modifier, puis F15 pour valider la mise à jour ou F13 pour saisir une nouvelle adresse)."
fieldUpdates.name: FRA -Alert update address in back office

fieldUpdates.description: Do not display indication when no modification has been done in the address.
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Alert update address backoffice OK

fieldUpdates.description: Convert country iso2 to country iso (3 chars)
fieldUpdates.name: Billing Country
FRA - Account RecordType changed from Pr

fieldUpdates.description: Update Field Reactivated date to blank
fieldUpdates.name: FRA Make Reactivation Date As Blank

fieldUpdates.description: Unchecked Reactivated Customer field
fieldUpdates.name: FRA Uncheck Reactivated Customer field
FRA - Update Account Customer Class Code

fieldUpdates.description: Check field to true when account is 'Customer' and status is changes to Active
fieldUpdates.name: FRA Update Reactivated Customer checkb

fieldUpdates.description: Update Field Reactivated date when account status is 'Customer' and account state changes from inactive to active.
fieldUpdates.name: FRA Update Reactivation Date

fieldUpdates.description: Used to populate description account with description lead when lead is converted
fieldUpdates.name: FRA_Account Prospect description Populat
FRA_ Account Prospect CSE Agence Update
FRA - PA RT changed to PA PC Prospect
FRA - PC Account RT changed to Customer

fieldUpdates.description: Chnage Record Type when Status of personAccount change from Prospect to Customer
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - PersonAccount RecordType changed

fieldUpdates.description: Change Record Type when Status of person Business Partner change from Prospect to Customer
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - PersonBP RecordType Changed

fieldUpdates.description: Person Account CSE Agence Update
fieldUpdates.name: FRA_Person Account CSE Agence Update

fieldUpdates.description: Person Account CSE Group Update
fieldUpdates.name: FRA_Person Account CSE Group Update
FRA RCT Sub Group Risk Code update

fieldUpdates.description: Update Data Action date
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Data Action Date

fieldUpdates.description: Set Guarantee if type is filled
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - Update Guarantee Check

fieldUpdates.description: Reset data Flow Creation to null
fieldUpdates.name: FRA - reset creation flag
INT - Reset Data Flow Update Flag

fieldUpdates.description: Magister update to TRUE
fieldUpdates.name: Magister update to TRUE
RCT Group Risk Code update v2

fieldUpdates.description: Make Boolean field False to by pass update operation
fieldUpdates.name: Real Time Croatia Bypass - Account

fieldUpdates.description: This field update has been set up to reset the Anonymization_Bypass__c field to false once it has been set to true by the anonymization process. It prevents the record from bypassing VRs after having been anonymized.
fieldUpdates.name: Reset Account Anonymization Bypass

fieldUpdates.description: Calculate and Set the Account External Key
fieldUpdates.name: Set External Key
Set Lead Convert to Blank Value

fieldUpdates.description: Update Account_Owner (Custom field present in the Search Layout) when the Account Owner (Standard Field) is Updated
fieldUpdates.name: Update Account Owner Custom field
Update Code Sub Group Risk null
Update RCT Group Risk Code null
Update RCT Sub Group Risk Code null

fieldUpdates.description: CRMV2
fieldUpdates.name: Update data flow modification flag
update account number with generated val

fieldUpdates.description: Mise à jour du champ last date calculation
fieldUpdates.name: update date calculation

fieldUpdates.description: Save the status modification date (From Prospect to Customer)
fieldUpdates.name: update date status

rules.fullName: %5BFR%5D Email alert on accounts with New Orders Blocked checked
rules.formula: AND (NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),(RecordType.Name ='Account France Customer Parcours,Account France Customer'), New_Orders_Blocked__c =True )

rules.fullName: ALL - Update Account Owner Custom field when Standard Field is Updated
rules.description: Update Account_Owner (Custom field present in the Search Layout) when the Account Owner (Standard Field) is Updated
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),ISCHANGED(OwnerId))
IF(AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(ISBLANK(Data_Flow_Update_Flag__c), Syncronize_Count__c = null)),true,false)

rules.fullName: Billing Country - Convert Iso2 to Iso
rules.description: For All Countries - Convert Iso2 to Iso (3 chars)
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISBLANK(BillingCountry)), ISCHANGED(BillingCountry) )

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),OR( ISCHANGED( Current_Orders__c ) , ISCHANGED( Total_Fleet__c ) , ISCHANGED( Total_Fleet_This_Account__c ) , ISCHANGED( Current_Orders_This_Account__c ) , ISCHANGED( Returns_90_Days_This_Account__c ), ISCHANGED( Returns_90_Days__c )))

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c), ISCHANGED(NTA_Validity_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Magister_Rating_Note__c), ISCHANGED(NTA_Rating_Note__c), OR(IF(BLANKVALUE(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) > BLANKVALUE(NTA_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)), Magister_Rating_Note__c , NTA_Rating_Note__c ) ='8', IF(BLANKVALUE(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) > BLANKVALUE(NTA_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) , Magister_Rating_Note__c , NTA_Rating_Note__c ) ='9', IF(BLANKVALUE(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) > BLANKVALUE(NTA_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) , Magister_Rating_Note__c , NTA_Rating_Note__c ) ='10'), Default_Situation__c =False)

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), IF(BLANKVALUE(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) > BLANKVALUE(NTA_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) , Magister_Rating_Note__c , NTA_Rating_Note__c ) <>'8', IF(BLANKVALUE(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) > BLANKVALUE(NTA_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) , Magister_Rating_Note__c , NTA_Rating_Note__c ) <>'9', IF(BLANKVALUE(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) > BLANKVALUE(NTA_Validity_Date__c,DATE(1980,01,01)) , Magister_Rating_Note__c , NTA_Rating_Note__c ) <>'10', Default_Situation__c =True)

rules.fullName: FRA %E2%80%93 Account Recordtype changed from Prospect to Customer BP
rules.description: CRM V2 - created in order to automatically change the record type of an Account when its type is changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Customer'), ISCHANGED(Status__c) )

rules.fullName: FRA - Account France Populate CSE ODCR
rules.description: Used for populate CSE / Agency account when Lead is converted by WS ODCR (webQuoter)
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISBLANK(CSE__c), NOT(Group_Of_Sales_Assistant__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', INCLUDES($User.bypass_appex_triggers__c, 'WS_ConvertLead'), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ALD'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'BREMANY'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LYNK&CO'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'SMART ML'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LOTUS'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'POLESTAR'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LEASEWAY'))))

rules.fullName: FRA - Account Populate Business Partner CSE ODCR
rules.description: Used for populate CSE / Agency account when Lead is converted by WS ODCR (webQuoter)
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect', INCLUDES($User.bypass_appex_triggers__c, 'WS_ConvertLead'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'BREMANY'))

rules.description: Used for populate CSE / Agency account when Lead is converted by WS COURTIER
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Agency__c))), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', INCLUDES($User.bypass_appex_triggers__c, 'WS_ConvertLead'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ALD'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'SMART ML'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'BYD'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LOTUS'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'POLESTAR'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LEASEWAY'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'OMODA JAECOO LEASE')))

rules.description: Used for populate CSE / Agency account when Lead is converted by WS LYNK&CO
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), INCLUDES($User.bypass_appex_triggers__c, 'WS_ConvertLead'), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', OR(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LYNK&CO'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'POLESTAR'), AND(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ALD'), ISBLANK(TEXT(Agency__c)))))

rules.fullName: FRA - Account RecordType changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.description: CRM V2 - created in order to automatically change the record type of an Account when its type is changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Customer'), ISCHANGED(Status__c) )

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25001'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25002'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25003')), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Prospect'))

rules.fullName: FRA - Alert update address in back office
rules.description: Display alert message when a modification is made in the address.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Customer_Parcours') && (ISCHANGED(BillingCity) || ISCHANGED(BillingCountry) || ISCHANGED(BillingStreet) || ISCHANGED(BillingState) || ISCHANGED(BillingPostalCode)))

rules.fullName: FRA - Alert update address in back office OK
rules.description: Do not display alert message when no modification in the address has been done
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Customer_Parcours') && NOT((ISCHANGED(BillingCity) || ISCHANGED(BillingCountry) || ISCHANGED(BillingStreet) || ISCHANGED(BillingState) || ISCHANGED(BillingPostalCode))))

rules.description: FRA - Automatic assignment for Partner BP
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Apporteur_d_affaire_Bremany' )

rules.fullName: FRA - Automatic assignment for White Label
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceApporteurdAffaires', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Partner_Type__c))), ISPICKVAL(Partner_Type__c, 'Dealer') )

rules.fullName: FRA - BP Partner potential to ALD Potential

criteriaItems.value: France Business Partner Customer,France Business Partner Prospect

rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Customer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect'), OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Sales_Channel__c, '05 - Autres')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Sales_Channel_Group__c, 'Autres'))))

rules.description: CRMv2 - Check the checkbox 'Data flow error' if an data flow error was detected
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISBLANK(Data_flow_Reject_Cause__c)), ISCHANGED(Data_flow_Reject_Cause__c) )

rules.description: CRMv2 - Uncheck the checkbox 'Data flow error' if no data flow error was detected
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISBLANK(Data_flow_Reject_Cause__c), ISCHANGED(Data_flow_Reject_Cause__c) )

rules.fullName: FRA - France Status Account Broker Webservice
rules.description: Check the checkbox Regional_Target__c (Account with no broker) for account created by webservice.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName='AccountFranceProspect',RecordType.DeveloperName='AccountFranceCustomer',RecordType.DeveloperName='PersonAccountFranceProspect',RecordType.DeveloperName='PersonAccountFranceCustomer'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25001'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ALD'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ORIGIN TEMSYS') ), ISBLANK(Broker_2__c) )

rules.description: Set Garantee to true if type is filled
Set Garantee to False if type is null

rules.fullName: FRA - Identification Criteria Field Update ALD
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c,''), IF($Setup.User__c.Is_Partner__c,FALSE,TRUE))

rules.fullName: FRA - Identification Criteria Field Update BP
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c ,''))

rules.fullName: FRA - Identification Criteria Field Update Parcours
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Customer_Parcours'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c,''), IF($Setup.User__c.Is_Partner__c,FALSE,TRUE))

rules.fullName: FRA - Parcours Account RecordType changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Customer'), ISCHANGED(Status__c) )

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(PA_ValidatedScoringDocuments__c), PA_ValidatedScoringDocuments__c, OR( RecordType.DeveloperName ='PersonAccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName ='PersonAccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName='PersonAccountBusinessPartnerProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName='PersonAccountBusinessPartnerCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName='Person_Account_France_Customer_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName='Person_Account_France_Prospect_Parcours'), NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c) )

rules.description: FRA - Person Account Unicity
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountBusinessPartnerCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountBusinessPartnerProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Person_Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Person_Account_France_Customer_Parcours' ), OR(ISCHANGED(FirstName), ISCHANGED(LastName), ISCHANGED(BirthDatePersoneAccount__c), ISCHANGED(Identification_Criteria__c), ISNEW()) )

rules.description: Person accounts CSE fields by default.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISBLANK(CSE__c), NOT(Group_Of_Sales_Assistant__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Agency__c)), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ORIGIN PARCOURS'))))

rules.fullName: FRA - PersonAccount Recordtype changed to Person Account PC
rules.description: For the conversion when a profile works on multiple record types.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountFranceProspect', ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary__c, 'France Parcours'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25003') )

rules.fullName: FRA - PersonPC RecordType Changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Person_Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Customer'), ISCHANGED(Status__c) )

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25001'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'TOYOTA GC'), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LEXUS GC'))

rules.fullName: FRA - Status is Customer and State is Active
rules.description: Check Reactivated Customer field and update reactivated date when Status of Account is customer and state of account change from inactive to active
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(ISPICKVAL( Subsidiary_Indicator__c , '25001'),ISPICKVAL( Subsidiary_Indicator__c , '25002'),ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'25003')), ISCHANGED(Status__c), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Customer') , ISCHANGED(State__c), ISPICKVAL( State__c , 'Active'), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(State__c ) , 'Inactive') )

rules.fullName: FRA - Status is Customer and State is Inactive
rules.description: Unchecked Reactivated customer field and make reactivated date to blank when status of account is customer and state of account changes from inactive to active
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR( ISPICKVAL( Subsidiary_Indicator__c , '25001'),ISPICKVAL( Subsidiary_Indicator__c , '25002'),ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'25003')) , ISCHANGED(Status__c), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Customer') , ISCHANGED(State__c), ISPICKVAL( State__c , 'Inactive'))

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', OR(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'BREMANY')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'FFM')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'LEASE')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'ORIGIN PARCOURS')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'PARCOURS'))), OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary__c, 'France')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25001'))))

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours'), OR((ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'G-LEASE')), ISPICKVAL(Identification_Criteria__c, 'PARCOURS')), OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary__c, 'France Parcours')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25003'))))

rules.fullName: FRA - Sync Account update CodeNic Is Null
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Customer_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Customer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect'), NOT(ISBLANK(Registration_Number__c)), ISCHANGED(Registration_Number__c), ISBLANK(Code_NIC__c), ISCHANGED(Code_NIC__c) )

rules.description: JFF :25/10/2011 adding condition Risk_Reference__c , CRM v2 : Update magister flag for risk reference accounts 30/04: created by JGV JGV 01/08 : only countries existing in Magister can be sent AEK 24/06/2010 : condition Prospect -> Cutomer added
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(Ispickval(Status__c,"Customer"), Ispickval(Status__c,"Prospect")), OR(Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'25001'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'25002'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'25003'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'38001'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'4001_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'19101_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'19102_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'34801_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'64201_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'68801_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'68801_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'70301_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'70501_Neutralized'), Ispickval(Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'75601_Neutralized')), OR(AND(Risk_Reference__c ,OR(ISCHANGED( Local_CALDER_ID__c ),ISCHANGED( Name),ISCHANGED( Status__c ), ISCHANGED( Is_SG_Client__c ), ISCHANGED(Activity_Sector_Code__c), ISCHANGED( Account_Country_Code__c ),ISCHANGED( RecordTypeId ))), AND(ISCHANGED(Risk_Reference__c ),NOT(Magister_Export_to_CRM__c))))

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Account has been modified
rules.description: CRM V2 - if a modification occured when account has a flag then checkbox has_been_modified is set at true if needed.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),OR( text(Data_Flow_Creation_Flag__c) <> "", text(Data_Flow_Update_Flag__c) <> "" ), OR( ISCHANGED(OwnerId), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Prospect"), OR(ISCHANGED(Name), ISCHANGED(Siren__c ), ISCHANGED(Code_NIC__c), ISCHANGED(Type_Of_Company__c ) ) ), ISCHANGED(CSE__c), ISCHANGED(VAT_Number__c), ISCHANGED(ParentId), ISCHANGED(Customer_Class_Code__c ), ISCHANGED(Is_SG_Client__c) , ISCHANGED(NumberOfEmployees) , ISCHANGED(Turnover__c), ISCHANGED(Activity_Sector_Code__c), ISCHANGED(Sales_Channel_Group__c ), ISCHANGED(Sales_Channel__c ), ISCHANGED(BillingStreet), ISCHANGED(BillingCity), ISCHANGED(BillingPostalCode), ISCHANGED(Cedex__c), ISCHANGED(Account_Country_Code__c), ISCHANGED(Phone), ISCHANGED(Fax), ISCHANGED(End_Of_Fiscal_Year__c), ISCHANGED(Top_Risk_Group__c), ISCHANGED(National_Bank_Rating__c), ISCHANGED(RCT_Code__c), ISCHANGED(RCT_Group_Code__c), ISCHANGED(Magister_Rating_Note__c) , ISCHANGED(Magister_Rating_Validity_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Default_Situation__c ), ISCHANGED(Code_Group_Risk__c), ISCHANGED(PCRU__c ) ), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw'), $Profile.Name <> "API User 2" )

rules.description: CRM V2 - used for data flows to detect account modification : the flag is filled with current date/time when CA* field is modified - 2nd formula
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), $User.Id <> '00520000002jAYc',$User.Id <> '00520000000pJKv', NOT(AND(Is_Mass_Update__c,$Profile.Name ='System Administrator'))&&NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c) && AND( OwnerId <>'00520000000pIct', OR( RecordTypeId = "01220000000Cm83", RecordTypeId = "012200000008pQB", RecordTypeId = "01220000000E0nr", RecordTypeId = "01220000000E0nw",RecordType.DeveloperName ='PersonAccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName ='PersonAccountBusinessPartnerProspect',RecordType.DeveloperName ='PersonAccountBusinessPartnerCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName ='PersonAccountFranceProspect',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Customer_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Person_Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Person_Account_France_Customer_Parcours') , TEXT(Data_Flow_Creation_Flag__c) = "", TRIM(Local_CALDER_ID__c)<>"", $Profile.Name <> "API User 2", OR( ISCHANGED(CSE__c), ISCHANGED(VAT_Number__c), ISCHANGED( OwnerId ), ISCHANGED( Balanced_Authorized_Credit__c ), ISCHANGED( Exemption_Taxe_Professionnelle__c ), ISCHANGED( Estimated_Potential__c ), ISCHANGED( Fleet_Potential_Cars__c ), ISCHANGED( Fleet_Potential_Vans__c ), ISCHANGED( Fleet_Potential_VS__c ), ISCHANGED( Group_Of_Sales_Assistant__c ), ISCHANGED( Agency__c ), ISCHANGED( Invoicing_Blocked__c), ISCHANGED( New_Orders_Blocked__c), ISCHANGED( Guarantee__c ), ISCHANGED( Guarantee_Expiration_Date__c), ISCHANGED( Guarantee_Amount__c ), ISCHANGED( Guarantee_Type__c ), ISCHANGED( Last_Assessment_Date__c ), ISCHANGED( Last_Revision_Date__c ), ISCHANGED( Last_Validated_Credit__c ), ISCHANGED( Credit_Acceptance_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Broker_2__c), ISCHANGED(Identification_Criteria__c) ),NOT(BEGINS(Local_CALDER_ID__c , 'L') ) ))

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Account reset creation flag
rules.description: CRM v2 - when a data flow error is detected and record has not been modified then creation flag is reset at null
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Data_flow_error__c), Data_flow_error__c, TEXT(Data_Flow_Creation_Flag__c)<>"" )
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'France VOP'))

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Code SG Risk Group
rules.description: This workflow will update the SG Risk Group Code on an account with the value on the related Risk Group Account. This workflow doesn't covers the Code update scenario on the Risk Group Account.
rules.formula: IF(AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Account_Risk_Type__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c,'Non Group')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Account_Risk_Type__c,'Person')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c ,'Risk Group')), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw', RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Customer_Parcours')),True,False)

rules.fullName: FRA - Update Code SG Sub Risk Group
rules.description: This workflow will update the SG Sub Risk Group Code on an account with the value on the related Risk Group Account. This workflow doesn't covers the Code update scenario on the Risk Group Account.
rules.formula: IF(AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c,'Non Group')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Account_Risk_Type__c,'Person')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c ,'Sub Risk Group')), ISCHANGED(Account_Risk_Type__c), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr', RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw', RecordType.DeveloperName ='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName ='Account_France_Customer_Parcours')),True,False)

rules.description: CRMV2 - Set Customer Class Code when converted from a lead
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Customer_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Customer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect'), ISNULL(Customer_Class_Code__c))

rules.description: Permet de tracer la date de dernière modification effectuée par le broker
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25003'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25002'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25001')), OR( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Data_Flow_Creation_Flag__c)), ISCHANGED(Data_Flow_Creation_Flag__c)), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Data_Flow_Update_Flag__c)), ISCHANGED(Data_Flow_Creation_Flag__c))))

rules.description: CRM V2 - Magister Link (JFF--> Added Bremany 3/05/2011) CRM V2 - Magister Link (Added Parcours 24/04/2017)
rules.formula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Customer_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Customer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect'), OR(ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(Siren__c)) )

rules.description: Save the status modification date (From Prospect to Customer)
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Status__c , "Customer"))

rules.fullName: FRA Non Group and Person Accounts Risk fields null
rules.description: This workflow will empty the risk fields for 'Non Group' and 'Person' accounts (except the lookup fields).
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Account_Risk_Type__c), OR(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c,'Non Group'), ISPICKVAL( Account_Risk_Type__c,'Person')), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw', RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours',RecordType.DeveloperName='Account_France_Customer_Parcours'))

rules.fullName: FRA RCT Group Risk Code update v2
rules.description: This workflow will fill the field 'RCT Group Risk Code' every time it is empty for a risk account with the field 'RCT Group Code'.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Account_Risk_Type__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c,'Non Group')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Account_Risk_Type__c,'Person')), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw', RecordType.DeveloperName ='Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName ='Account_France_Customer_Parcours'), RCT_Group_Risk_Code__c = '')

rules.fullName: FRA RCT Sub Group Risk Code update
rules.description: It will fill the field 'RCT Sub Group Risk Code' every time it is empty with the hidden field 'RCT Group Sub Risk Code Hidden' it also corrects the field's vlaue if it isn't empty for a Risk Group account, or if it is wrong for a subsidiary account.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Account_Risk_Type__c), OR(AND(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c,'Non Group')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Account_Risk_Type__c,'Person')), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw'), RCT_Sub_Group_Risk_Code__c = '', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c ,'Risk Group'))), AND(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c,'Non Group')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Account_Risk_Type__c,'Person')), OR(RecordTypeId = '01220000000Cm83',RecordTypeId = '012200000008pQB',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nr',RecordTypeId = '01220000000E0nw'), RCT_Sub_Group_Risk_Code__c <>'',OR(ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c ,'Risk Group'),ISPICKVAL(Account_Risk_Type__c ,'Subsidiary')))))

rules.fullName: FRA_PersonAccount Recordtype changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.description: CRM PersonAccount change Prospect to Customer
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountFranceProspect', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Customer'), ISCHANGED(Status__c) )

rules.fullName: FRA_PersonBP RecordType Changed from Prospect to Customer
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccountBusinessPartnerProspect', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Customer'), ISCHANGED(Status__c) )

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceProspect', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Prospect_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Account_France_Customer_Parcours', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountFranceCustomer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Customer', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'France_Business_Partner_Prospect'))

rules.fullName: INT - Reset Data Flow Modification Flag Magister
rules.description: to reset Data flow Flag set by Broker for others countries than france (waiting for correction from the broker)
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISBLANK(Data_Flow_Update_Flag__c)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25001'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25002'), ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary_Indicator__c, '25003')))
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountInternational', ISBLANK(AccountNumber))

rules.description: by default set to credit acceptance date
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISBLANK(Credit_Acceptance_Date__c)), ISBLANK(Last_Revision_Date__c))

rules.description: If initial account owner (who performs the transfer) is from the Direct Sales Channel or IC, users notified are: o Deputy Sales Director Direct Channel – Telmo Nóbrega o Key User / Administrator – Pilar Madeira
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),OR($UserRole.DeveloperName = $Label.PRT_Portugal_Corporate_DevName,$UserRole.DeveloperName = $Label.PRT_Portugal_IC_DevName) , ISCHANGED( OwnerId ))

rules.description: If initial account owner (who performs the transfer) is from the Indirect Sales Channel, users notified are: o Deputy Sales Director Indirect Channel – Miguel Barrela o Key User / Administrator – Pilar Madeira
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), OR( $UserRole.DeveloperName = $Label.PRT_Portugal_Indirect_Bank_Channel_DevName ,$UserRole.DeveloperName = $Label.PRT_Portugal_Indirect_Partnerships_DevName ), ISCHANGED( OwnerId ))
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), Parent_is_Group_SG__c = 1)

AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), OR(CONTAINS( $Label.RealTime_Latam_country , TEXT(Subsidiary__c)), CONTAINS('Brazil', TEXT(Subsidiary__c)), CONTAINS('Italy', TEXT(Subsidiary__c)), CONTAINS('Romania', TEXT(Subsidiary__c))), NOT(ISBLANK( TEXT(Identification_Criteria__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Subsidiary_Indicator__c))), RecordTypeId='0123X000000eUns')

rules.fullName: RT- Set Lead Convert to Blank
rules.description: Set the lead convert field to Blank ,to differentiate the Account creation on lead Conversion and on manual account create/Update
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), NOT(ISBLANK(Lead_Convert__c)))
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(RealTime_Croatia_Bypass__c), RealTime_Croatia_Bypass__c = True)

rules.description: This workflow & field update has been set up to reset the Anonymization_Bypass__c field to false once it has been set to true by the anonymization process. It prevents the record from bypassing VRs after having been anonymized.
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), ISCHANGED(Anonymization_Bypass__c), Anonymization_Bypass__c =True)

rules.description: This workflow will set the field 'Calder code indexed' to the value of first four digit of 'CALDER Owner' and set the field 'Subsidiary Indicator indexed' to the value of the field 'Subsidiary Indicator' on account.
rules.formula: IF( ISNEW(), AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),1=1), AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c),1=1, OR(ISCHANGED(CALDER_Owner__c), ISCHANGED(Subsidiary_Indicator__c))) )

rules.fullName: Set %27Apex or User Update%27 to False
rules.description: This workflow will set the field 'Apex ou User Update' to False after the apex unchecks Risk Reference on account
rules.formula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), Apex_or_User_Update__c = True)
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Workflow__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.CRM_BROKER_ALDML_ID, $User.Id)), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AccountInternational')
